fields.name: RSVD_2_0
fields.description: These bits must be set to '0' for the correct operation of the device

fields.name: DEC
fields.description: Decimation of acceleration data on OUT REG and FIFO. Default value: 00 (00: no decimation; 01: update every 2 samples; 10: update every 4 samples; 11: update every 8 samples)

fields.name: Zen_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer's Z-axis output enable. Default value: 1 (0: Z-axis output disabled; 1: Z-axis output enabled)

fields.name: Yen_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer's Y-axis output enable. Default value: 1 (0: Y-axis output disabled; 1: Y-axis output enabled)

fields.name: Xen_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer's X-axis output enable. Default value: 1 (0: X-axis output disabled; 1: X-axis output enabled)

Accelerometer.name: INT_GEN_SRC_XL
Accelerometer.description: Linear acceleration sensor interrupt source register

fields.name: RSVD_7_4
fields.description: Must be set to 0 for correct operation

fields.name: RSVD_5_4
fields.description: Must be set to 0 for correct operation

fields.name: LP_MODE
fields.description: Low-power mode enable. Default value: 0 (0: Low-power disabled; 1: Low-power enabled)

fields.name: HP_EN
fields.description: High-pass filter enable. Default value: 0 (0: HPF disabled; 1: HPF enabled)

fields.name: HPCF_G
fields.description: Gyroscope high-pass filter cutoff frequency selection. Default value: 0000

Gyroscope.name: ORIENT_CFG_G
Gyroscope.description: Angular rate sensor sign and orientation register

fields.name: RSVD_7
fields.description: Reserved bit must be set to 0

Gyroscope.name: INT_GEN_SRC_G
Gyroscope.description: Interrupt generator source register for gyroscope

fields.name: IA_G
fields.description: Interrupt active. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt has been generated; 1: one or more interrupts have been generated)

fields.name: ZH_G
fields.description: Yaw (Z) high. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: Z high event has occurred)

fields.name: ZL_G
fields.description: Yaw (Z) low. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt; 1: Z low event has occurred)

fields.name: YH_G
fields.description: Roll (Y) high. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: Y high event has occurred)

fields.name: YL_G
fields.description: Roll (Y) low. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: Y low event has occurred)

fields.name: XH_G
fields.description: Pitch (X) high. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: X high event has occurred)

fields.name: XL_G
fields.description: Pitch (X) low. Default value: 0 (0: no interrupt, 1: X low event has occurred)

Gyroscope.name: INT_GEN_DUR_G
Gyroscope.description: Interrupt generator duration register for gyroscope

fields.name: WAIT_G
fields.description: Exit from interrupt wait function enable. Default value: 0 (0: wait function off; 1: wait for DUR_G [6:0] samples before exiting interrupt)

fields.name: DUR_G
fields.description: Enter/exit interrupt duration value. Default Value: 000 0000

fields.name: TEMP_COMP
fields.description: Temperature compensation enable. Default value: 0 (0: temperature compensation disabled; 1: temperature compensation enabled)

fields.name: OM
fields.description: X and Y axes operative mode selection. Default value: 00

fields.name: DO
fields.description: Output data rate selection. Default value: 100

fields.name: ST
fields.description: Self-test enable. Default value: 0 (0: self-test disabled; 1: self-test enabled)

fields.name: REBOOT
fields.description: Reboot memory content. Default value: 0 (0: normal mode; 1: reboot memory content)

fields.name: SOFT_RST
fields.description: Configuration registers and user register reset function. (0: default value; 1: reset operation)

fields.name: I2C_DISABLE
fields.description: Disable I2C interface. Default value 0. (0: I2C enable; 1: I2C disable)

fields.name: SIM
fields.description: SPI Serial Interface mode selection. Default value: 0 (0: SPI only write operations enabled; 1: SPI read and write operations enable)

fields.name: OUT_Z_H_M
fields.description: Magnetometer Z-axis data output. The value of the magnetic field is expressed as two’s complement.

fields.name: XIEN
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation on X-axis. 0: disable; 1: enable

fields.name: YIEN
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation on Y-axis. 0: disable; 1: enable

fields.name: ZIEN
fields.description: Enable interrupt generation on Z-axis. 0: disable; 1: enable

fields.name: RSV
fields.description: Must be set to 0 for correct operation

fields.name: IEA
fields.description: Interrupt active configuration on INT_MAG. 0: low; 1: high

fields.name: IEL
fields.description: Latch interrupt request. 0: latched; 1: not latched

fields.name: IEN
fields.description: Interrupt enable on INT_M pin. 0: disable; 1: enable

fields.name: INT1_IG_G
fields.description: Gyroscope interrupt enable on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT_IG_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer interrupt generator on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT_FSS5
fields.description: FSS5 interrupt enable on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT_OVR
fields.description: Overrun interrupt on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT_FTH
fields.description: FIFO threshold interrupt on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT_BOOT
fields.description: Boot status available on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT_DRDY_G
fields.description: Gyroscope data ready on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: INT_DRDY_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer data ready on INT 1_A/G pin. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

Interrupts.name: STATUS_REG_M
Interrupts.description: Magnetometer status register with overrun and new data flags

fields.name: ZYXOR
fields.description: X, Y and Z-axis data overrun. 0: no overrun; 1: new data overwritten previous

fields.name: ZOR
fields.description: Z-axis data overrun. 0: no overrun; 1: new data overwritten previous

fields.name: YOR
fields.description: Y-axis data overrun. 0: no overrun; 1: new data overwritten previous

fields.name: XOR
fields.description: X-axis data overrun. 0: no overrun; 1: new data overwritten previous

fields.name: ZYXDA
fields.description: X, Y and Z-axis new data available. 0: not available; 1: available

fields.name: ZDA
fields.description: Z-axis new data available. 0: not available; 1: available

fields.name: YDA
fields.description: Y-axis new data available. 0: not available; 1: available

fields.name: XDA
fields.description: X-axis new data available. 0: not available; 1: available

quality_issues: zone_validation:weak_field_evidence

fields.name: THS_H
fields.description: High byte of interrupt threshold value.

fields.name: FTH
fields.description: FIFO threshold status. (0: FIFO filling is lower than threshold level; 1: FIFO filling is equal or higher than threshold level)

fields.name: OVRN
fields.description: FIFO overrun status. (0: FIFO is not completely filled; 1: FIFO is completely filled and at least one samples has been overwritten)

fields.name: FSS
fields.description: Number of unread samples stored into FIFO. (000000: FIFO empty; 100000: FIFO full, 32 unread samples)

fields.name: RSVD_
fields.description: Reserved bit must be set to 0

fields.name: RSVD_2
fields.description: Reserved bit must be set to 0
